description: Mog Coin (MOG) emerged in 2023 on Ethereum as a self-aware pixel-cat meme built on humor, chaos, and the culture of “mogging,” rising quickly across Web3. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 MOG gives MOG holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, full AI contract capability, turning MOG into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Mog Coin
